creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 143756
svndiff of patch

Fixing some USES and pkg-plist issues with net-snmp with the attached patch.

The poudriere run can be found at

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/misc/net-snmp-5.7.2_10.log

I am not sure about the effect of the libtool:keepla and need feedback
if this is OK.

Please approve this patch.
